top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'N';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) 
FROM atom 
WHERE element = 'N' AND molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id 
    FROM atom 
    WHERE element = 'C' OR element = 'O' OR element = 'N' OR element = 'S' OR element = 'P' OR element = 'H'
)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'N';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)  
FROM molecule m  
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT a.molecule_id  
    FROM atom a  
    WHERE a.element = 'N'
)  
AND m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT a2.molecule_id  
    FROM atom a2  
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'O', 'N', 'S', 'P', 'H')
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) 
FROM atom 
WHERE element = 'N' AND molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id 
    FROM atom 
    WHERE element = 'C' OR element = 'O' OR element = 'N' OR element = 'S' OR element = 'P' OR element = 'H'
)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'N';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)  
FROM molecule m  
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT a.molecule_id  
    FROM atom a  
    WHERE a.element = 'N'
)  
AND m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT a2.molecule_id  
    FROM atom a2  
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'O', 'N', 'S', 'P', 'H')
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'N'
  AND m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT a2.molecule_id
    FROM atom a2
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'O', 'N', 'S', 'P', 'H')
  );

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'N';
